text:
あれー？　もしかして
バレットボウを使うの、初めて？

ま、初めてでも、そうでなくても
別にいいんだけど。

大事なのは技術よりも
呼吸を合わせる強い心だからねー。

心に動揺がなきゃ
矢が的を外れることはないよ。
ま、がんばってみよー！

Wait, is this your first time getting hands-on
with a photon bow?

Not that it really matters or anything, don't
sweat it!

See, with bows, it's less about your skill, and
more about your ability to focus on your
breathing.

As long as you're calm and centered, your
shots will be, too. So go on and give it a try!
